meta.description: Human-facing smell index for triage. Each smell maps to a canonical rule in rubric.json via rule_ref.

smells.name: Overgrown controller action
smells.summary: HTTP layer doing persistence, mail, and domain rules in one method.
smells.typical_fix: Extract a Form Request, action/service, and return a thin response.

smells.name: Mass assignment from raw request
smells.summary: fill/create/update driven by $request->all() or unvalidated arrays.
smells.typical_fix: Use validated() data, Form Requests, or an explicit DTO.

smells.name: Scattered inline validation
smells.summary: Controllers call $request->validate repeatedly instead of centralising rules.
smells.typical_fix: Introduce Form Request classes shared with other entry points.

smells.name: Unauthorised mutation surface
smells.summary: Destructive routes without policy, gate, or middleware alignment.
smells.typical_fix: Add policy methods, $this->authorize, or route middleware with abilities.

smells.name: Duplicated authorisation checks
smells.summary: Role strings and ownership logic copied across controllers.
smells.typical_fix: Move to policies and reuse across HTTP and CLI.

smells.name: N+1 queries
smells.summary: Relations accessed inside loops without eager loading.
smells.typical_fix: with(), load(), or reshape queries at the boundary.

smells.name: Unbounded result set
smells.summary: all()/get() for potentially large user-driven lists.
smells.typical_fix: paginate(), simplePaginate(), or cursorPaginate() as appropriate.

smells.name: Unsafe raw SQL
smells.summary: Raw SQL built with string concatenation instead of bindings.
smells.typical_fix: Use the query builder or parameter binding for dynamic fragments.

smells.name: Non-idempotent queued work
smells.summary: Side effects that duplicate on retry (payments, e-mails, inserts).
smells.typical_fix: Idempotency keys, unique constraints, ShouldBeUnique, or dedupe table.

smells.name: Blocking I/O in the request
smells.summary: Long HTTP calls or sleeps inline in controller flow.
smells.typical_fix: Dispatch a job with timeouts/backoff and user-visible progress if needed.

smells.name: Job without failure handling
smells.summary: ShouldQueue work with no clear failed path or retry tuning.
smells.typical_fix: failed(), structured logging, backoff, and alerts on poison messages.

smells.name: Split financial writes
smells.summary: Multiple balance or ledger writes without atomicity.
smells.typical_fix: DB::transaction with invariant checks inside the same unit of work.

smells.name: Long transaction
smells.summary: Network or mail inside a transaction holding row locks.
smells.typical_fix: Short transaction for writes; I/O after commit.

smells.name: Resource-driven N+1
smells.summary: API resources touching relations not eager loaded by the controller/query.
smells.typical_fix: Eager load at the query or split resource shaping.

smells.name: Tenant leak risk
smells.summary: Queries missing tenant constraints in multi-tenant schemas.
smells.typical_fix: Global scopes, policies, or explicit tenant predicates.

smells.name: Tenant ID from client
smells.summary: Trusting tenant identifiers from the request body or query alone.
smells.typical_fix: Resolve tenant from auth context, subdomain, or verified membership.

smells.name: Webhook side effects without dedupe
smells.summary: Provider retries cause duplicate financial or inventory updates.
smells.typical_fix: Store external event IDs; return 200 only after durable record.

smells.name: Positive: unique queue execution
smells.summary: Signals good practice when concurrency could duplicate work.
smells.typical_fix: N/A — reinforcement signal.

smells.name: Filament query scope risk
smells.summary: Admin tables that widen or drop global scopes unintentionally.
smells.typical_fix: Deliberate getEloquentQuery with tenant/auth alignment.

smells.name: Fat Filament callbacks
smells.summary: Large work inside form field lifecycle hooks.
smells.typical_fix: Actions, services, or queued jobs with clear inputs.

smells.name: Tests skip authorisation
smells.summary: Feature tests hit protected routes without negative cases.
smells.typical_fix: assertForbidden, guest redirects, and policy-backed scenarios.

smells.name: Flaky database tests
smells.summary: Tests mutate shared database state without isolation.
smells.typical_fix: RefreshDatabase, database transactions, or parallel-safe factories.

smells.name: Model mass-assignment risk
smells.summary: Sensitive attributes exposed via guarded/fillable misconfiguration.
smells.typical_fix: Tight fillable, DTOs, or explicit property sets per use case.

smells.name: Sensitive data in logs
smells.summary: Passwords, tokens, or full payloads logged.
smells.typical_fix: Redact fields; structured logging with allow-lists.

smells.name: Abusable route without throttle
smells.summary: Sensitive mutation endpoints missing rate limits.
smells.typical_fix: throttle middleware, gateway limits, or user-scoped quotas.

smells.name: Positive: eager loads at boundary
smells.summary: Deliberate with() usage mitigating N+1.
smells.typical_fix: N/A — reinforcement signal.

smells.name: Over-abstracted simple flow
smells.summary: Too many layers for straightforward CRUD with no extra invariants.
smells.typical_fix: Collapse to action + model until complexity warrants repositories.
